title: The Specified Bank Notes (Cessation of Liabilities) Act, 2017
full_text: The Specified Bank Notes (Cessation of Liabilities) Act, 2017 विनिर्दिष्टि बैंक नोट (दायित्वोंन की समाप्तिि) अधिनियम,2017 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201702 Act Number: 02 Enactment Date: 2017-02-27 Act Year: 2017 Short Title: The Specified Bank Notes (Cessation of Liabilities) Act, 2017 Hindi Title: विनिर्दिष्टि बैंक नोट (दायित्वोंन की समाप्तिि) अधिनियम,2017 Long Title: An Act to provide in the public interest for the cessation of liabilities on the specified bank notes and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Economic Affairs Enforcement Date: 31-12-2016 Last Updated: 19-11-2018 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Specified Bank Notes (Cessation of Liabilities) Act, 2017 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Specified bank notes to cease to be liability of Reserve Bank or Central Government. Section 4. Exchange of specified bank notes. Section 5. Prohibition on holding transferring or receiving specified bank notes. Show Related Subordinates Section 6. Penalty for contravention of section 4. Section 7. Penalty for contravention of section 5. Section 8. Offences by companies. Section 9. Special provisions relating to offences. Section 10. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 11. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Power to remove difficulties. Show Related Subordinates Section 13. Repeal and savings.
